2026-04-24T22:37:33.3378571Z [command]/usr/bin/git version
2026-04-24T22:37:33.3431612Z git version 2.53.0
2026-04-24T22:37:33.3494499Z Temporarily overriding HOME='/home/runner/work/_temp/fcef17f0-99e7-46f3-ba3e-13c1beaebdd1' before making global git config changes
2026-04-24T22:37:33.3498652Z Adding repository directory to the temporary git global config as a safe directory
2026-04-24T22:37:33.3509414Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --global --add safe.directory /home/runner/work/azure-sdk-for-net/azure-sdk-for-net
2026-04-24T22:37:33.3556820Z Removing SSH command configuration
2026-04-24T22:37:33.3562294Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp core\.sshCommand
2026-04-24T22:37:33.3604940Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive sh -c "git config --local --name-only --get-regexp 'core\.sshCommand' && git config --local --unset-all 'core.sshCommand' || :"
2026-04-24T22:37:33.4066537Z Removing HTTP extra header
2026-04-24T22:37:33.4074769Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp http\.https\:\/\/github\.com\/\.extraheader
2026-04-24T22:37:33.4120059Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive sh -c "git config --local --name-only --get-regexp 'http\.https\:\/\/github\.com\/\.extraheader' && git config --local --unset-all 'http.https://github.com/.extraheader' || :"
2026-04-24T22:37:33.4580538Z Removing includeIf entries pointing to credentials config files
2026-04-24T22:37:33.4583054Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp ^includeIf\.gitdir:
2026-04-24T22:37:33.4627873Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive git config --local --show-origin --name-only --get-regexp remote.origin.url
